name: Dream Team: Birth of the Modern Athlete
original_name: Dream Team: Birth of the Modern Athlete
overview: The uncensored story of the 1992 men’s Olympic basketball team. Using unheard audio interviews and rare archival footage, the series shows how a once-in-a-lifetime superteam changed sports on a global scale forever.

trailers.title: Dream Team: Birth of the Modern Athlete | Now Streaming | Paramount+
